sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92279" key="r(ei/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥείτης</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, only in Gramm., as part of the compds. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βαθυρ-, ἐϋρ-ρείτης</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.256</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</entryFree>
